synopsis: Chaos reigns as the Defiant Imperial comes face-to-face with the heroes of the New Republic! Luke vs. a new Inquisitor! The Imperial survivors consolidate behind the Defiant Imperial, putting the just-formed New Republic at risk! Kes Dameron and his team try for a daring escape, but meet an unexpected hurdle! The Galactic Civil War takes a startling twist, and bad omens arise for the future of the New Republic!
title: Battle of Jakku: Insurgency Rising #04
